creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
label is documented in labwc-menu(5) manpage and docs/menu.xml example (not installed by the port) since 0.4.0. ~/.config/labwc/*.xml are populated by the user, so this seems like a pilot error and/or upstream behavior change. Nothing to fix downstream (in the port).

https://github.com/labwc/labwc/commit/1c5b5c25c5b1
https://github.com/labwc/labwc/commit/1a38cc846283
